name: research-mgr
description: Routing + tool use for the Research Manager. Exercises web_search and fetch_url with both lexical and rubric-based response checks.

cases.input: What time is sunrise in Chicago tomorrow?

expected_response.rubric: The response includes a specific clock time (e.g. '6:14 AM') and at least one source URL or domain name. It must not invent a time without citing a source.

cases.input: Fetch https://example.com and tell me what the page says.
Summarize the 2027 Gemini context-window leak announcement.

expected_response.rubric: If web_search returns no real result for a 2027 announcement, the agent must say so and not fabricate quotes, dates, or attendees.
